title: bromus madritensis var. rubens
intro: Bromus madritensis var. rubens, also known as red brome, is a perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of red brome include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Red brome is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
